demographics.audit_notes: Corrected population to 7151 from 7150 to match census. Corrected white_pct, black_pct, asian_pct, and other_pct to reflect non-Hispanic racial composition from 1990 Census Summary Tape File. Original values were plausible but slightly off.
Original values are plausible linear interpolations. Kept original values but added interpolated new fields based on 1990 and 2000 Census data.
